summary:
PRAYER CONFERENCE AND POLITICAL INTERCESSION: Brandon details his attendance at a prayer conference supporting Sister Billye's ministry, acknowledging the dedication of attendees who traveled from cities like Chicago, New York, and Los Angeles. Brandon shares that he was given the opportunity to speak about prophetic words and lead prayers concerning the nation. Brandon states that intense spiritual intercession took place regarding President Trump and the upcoming election. Brandon expresses strong belief in an imminent electoral victory for Trump, while echoing a warning from Sister Lynn to avoid post-election complacency. Brandon emphasizes the need for continued prayer over future cabinet selections, a landslide victory, and a supernatural shift allowing the House and the Senate to remain under conservative control.

ECONOMIC WARNINGS AND FINANCIAL FAITH: Brandon addresses the current economic situation, noting a rapid increase in the national deficit and a thirty-five trillion dollar national debt. Brandon explicitly states that the potential collapse of the dollar is a necessary step for the establishment of a one-world government and a digital platform. Despite these warnings, Brandon conveys a message from the Lord instructing believers not to fear financial instability. Brandon explains that consistent tithers will receive divine provision regardless of economic downturns, referencing historical examples from the Great Depression and figures like Brother Kenneth Hagin. Brandon urges attendees to focus on spiritual preparedness rather than succumbing to fear.

MIRACULOUS HEALING AND FAMILY TESTIMONY: Brandon shares updates regarding his daughter Megan following a ministry session with Billy Burke. Brandon reports observing tangible improvements in Megan's condition, noting that she has begun formulating sentences and communicating more in the past forty-eight hours than ever before. Brandon compares these developments to previous milestones, such as her successful potty training despite medical professionals predicting she would wear diapers indefinitely. Brandon states that he and his wife Diana are actively putting their faith into practice by resisting autism symptoms and integrating Megan into public settings.

INTERNATIONAL AND ELECTION INTEGRITY PRAYERS: Brandon outlines specific prayer focuses regarding international leadership and domestic election integrity. Brandon states that intercessions are being made for Canada, specifically requesting the removal of Justin Trudeau in favor of a righteous leader. Returning to domestic issues, Brandon mentions warnings from Jay Sekulow and declares prayer against illegal immigrants participating in elections without voter identification. Brandon concludes by emphasizing the need for an election process entirely free from corruption and rioting.
rawData: [October 19, 2024]-[A call to prayer - day 11 – praying for your finances]-[https://youtu.be/gNvhhUWoSZ0]-[Good morning, family! How are y'all doing? I just wanted to say thank you all for all the kindness. We're at this prayer conference right now, still in our hotel. We've been here for two days, and many of you traveled to see Sister Billye and support her ministry. We want to say thank you to all the subscribers who said they came here because of what we said to support Sister Billye. The prayer conference has been amazing and such a blessing. I want to say to all of you who traveled so far—from Chicago, New York, Los Angeles, and all over the United States—to support this conference and pray for our nation: God bless you all. I know it took a lot of time, effort, resources, and money for hotels and food. I know some of you spent thousands to do this, and I know God is an abundant supplier who will reward you for helping pray for our nation. Thank you for supporting Sister Billye and the family. They are some of the nicest people I have ever met. Seriously, y'all, they are genuinely nice people. Sometimes you get around Christians in upper leadership and you think they might be stuck up, but these people are really good people. I've been really impressed with how kind they've been to us. I'm grateful for their love toward my family. She let me talk last night about the prophetic words the Lord is showing me, and we prayed against some of the things the Lord showed me. It is amazing to see what the Lord has done in this amount of time. I felt like we were one of those big mega-ships plowing through the ice in the spirit realm concerning President Trump and the election. I could feel the shifting in the spirit as we were praying and interceding. It felt like we were plowing through demonic strongholds with so many seasoned prayer warriors. There are a lot of people standing for this nation. I believe beyond a shadow of a doubt that Trump is going to win this election and we're going to see victory. As Sister Lynn said today, 'Do not become complacent after you see the victory.' We have got to keep our foot on the gas and keep on praying over the cabinet and his decisions on who he surrounds himself with. We pray that he puts Godly men and women in positions of counsel so that when he wins, it will be by a landslide. We are also believing that God will take the House and the Senate for a supernatural move. The next four years should be smooth so that we can have a revival. We prayed about the financial collapse and the things the Lord showed me. I still feel something in the natural, but I am not moved by what I see or feel. I still have a caution and feel we have prayer to do concerning the economy. When I gave the word about the economy, the Lord rebuked me and said, 'Brandon, you need to tell My people do not fear.' He said, 'I will supply all your needs according to My riches in glory by Christ Jesus.' This is not for the believer; He said He will provide for His beloved. If you're a tither and a giver and believe that Jesus is your Jehovah Jireh, He will provide for you regardless of whether the bottom falls out tomorrow. I was looking at statistics today, and a news article stated that in the last three weeks, we've spent half a trillion dollars more in the deficit. It was skyrocketing on the graph. Our national debt is $35 trillion now. Are we moved by fear? No, but we know the signs of the times. The dollar is in the way; they have to take it down to bring in the one-world government and the digital platform. We can lessen the effect so that it will not affect you. I want you to be prepared spiritually, interceding for your house and listening to Him on how to intercede for our nation. We don't get into fear; we walk in faith. That's why I brought up food supplies and the dollar crash. I heard a testimony about people during the Great Depression who were consistent tithers and never lacked a job or any good thing. My granny told me it was terrible; she was 106 when she died and said it was terrible going through the depression, but they weren't tithers then. However, I heard of people like Brother Kenneth Hagin who believed in their covenant and made it through. Regardless of what the economy does, God will turn it around for your favor. We are overcomers by the blood of the Lamb and the word of our testimony. If I ever come off as a fearmonger, I want to emphasize that there is always faith to believe yourself out of any trap the devil tries to set. Whatsoever a man soweth, that will he also reap. This week has been interesting. When we went to Billy Burke, three major words were given to my wife and me. We were praying for Megan, and I can see a supernatural change already taking place in her. She is talking more in the last 48 hours than we've ever heard in her whole life. After the man of God prayed, she used appropriate words at the right timing. She was even jabbering and chirping to the people in front of us. I think they got up and left because she was disruptive, but Megan was trying to make sentences. You can see the wheels turning in her eyes. There is a tangible turnaround. If you are believing for something, get submersed in God's word and do not go dry. Give God the glory over every small thing that happens because it builds into a miracle. Like when she got potty trained; the doctors told us we would more than likely never see this child be potty trained. Professionals tried to help us and it did not work; they said she would wear a diaper the rest of her life. But God is rich in mercy. We had a glimmer of hope like Noah's olive leaf. When he prayed for her the first time, we stood by faith, and now we have our second olive leaf. We are fully persuaded, just like Abraham, that what God has promised He is able also to perform. Even if it seems impossible, all things are possible to him that believes. We've been putting her in an environment of faith at these services. It's been stretching her to sit for two services a day, and she's been saying, 'Daddy, my heiny hurts,' but it's time for her to come out. Faith without works is dead, so we are putting our faith in action. Diana refuses to treat her as anything other than healed. We are resisting the symptoms. We're going to sit down in restaurants as a family now. For years, we sat in the car and ate drive-through food because she was so bound up, but now we are pushing her by faith. We are not accepting the symptoms of autism anymore. She points to the menu and tells us what she wants. It's amazing. The olive leaf is becoming an olive branch. We're standing for the whole tree. We have to have humor and laugh a little bit because a merry heart does good like a medicine. We just came on today to tell everybody what the Lord is doing. The first hotel air conditioner was not working, so we had to move, but God is faithful. We appreciate your prayers for Megan. So many people said they are interceding for her, and it really blessed me. I am not a celebrity; I'm just me, and I wish I could hear all your stories. Let's pray for your finances and healing. Father, we take authority over demonic spirits and thank You that by Your stripes we are healed. We believe for a red wave and that the House and Senate will remain red with a larger majority. We pray for Canada to remove Justin Trudeau and for them to have a righteous leader. We pray against illegal immigrants voting without voter IDs; Jay Sekulow put that out, and we stand against it. We believe for an uncovering of darkness and a vote without corruption or rioting. I'll try to be up in the foyer if I can, but I don't want to take from Billye's event or be disrespectful. We agree that you are healed and everything is turning around for your good. Amen. Please subscribe if you're new; I'll be more consistent with videos once I'm home and have better internet. God bless you all!]
